approvalSource: Steve approved starting the Foundation gold-capture sprint after asking that every valuable item from the old-system/deep-audit conversation be carded first so it is not lost.
constraints: audit legacy systems only; no old-code import
no old-agent execution, crawler launch, browser automation, provider/model calls, or source-system mutation
metadata-only handling for OpenClaw/private runtime evidence
promote durable findings into live backlog/source/spec/proof truth
reject stale report piles and agent sprawl instead of carrying them forward
advance Current Sprint to STRATEGIC-INTEL-001 after clean closeout
